title: Solana Token Whale Alert
description: Subscribe to SPL token transfer events for any mint address via GoldRush's real-time activity stream on `solana-mainnet` — filter server-side for transfers above a configurable USD threshold (e.g. >$50K). Each alert payload includes: sender wallet, receiver wallet, token amount, USD value at time of transfer, and the tx signature for on-chain verification. Build a Telegram or Discord whale-alert bot that fires within seconds of a large transfer landing on-chain — under 100 lines of code.
